author: Daniel Wahnich
name: Aweb Depth Recurrence
blurb: 4 unique transformer blocks × 6 repeats = 24 effective layers at 768 dim. Universal Transformer-style weight sharing gives 2.67× the depth of the baseline (24 vs 9 layers) with similar parameter count (~17M). U-Net skip connections cycle through shared blocks. Same Muon + Adam optimizers, same int8+zlib quantization.
